title: callicarpa subaequalis
intro: Callicarpa subaequalis, also known as the Purple Fruit Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa subaequalis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Callicarpa subaequalis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
